goal: Ship one protected admin queue where a single operator can process core moderation workload (profiles, reviews, bookings, messages) without switching tools.

surfaces: admin dashboard home with queue summary cards
unified moderation queue list (single combined feed)
queue item detail panel with per-type moderation actions

defaultWorkflow: Dashboard shows count cards: profiles, reviews, bookings, message reports
Admin opens unified queue sorted by oldest submittedAt first
Admin reviews item detail and applies one supported action
Item leaves active queue and action is stored in audit log
operationalConstraints: All /admin routes require authenticated admin session
Every moderation action writes actorId, action, targetId, timestamp
State changes must map to existing feature states (no new public statuses)
Action latency target: <1 second server response for single item action
If an action fails, item remains unchanged and error is shown
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access any /admin route
Admin dashboard home displays accurate queue counts for profiles, reviews, bookings, and message reports
Unified queue displays mixed item types in one list with id, type, submittedAt, status, and riskLevel
Admin can complete one moderation action end-to-end for each type: profile, review, booking, message report
Successful action removes item from active queue and persists audit metadata
No analytics, bulk actions, or user management UI is required for launch
shipDefinition: MVP is shippable when one admin can clear daily moderation backlog (profiles/reviews/bookings/messages) from one queue in under 30 minutes without manual DB edits.
